title: Update ruleset bypass and release workflow for semantic-release
description: Add an approved automation bypass path in the repository ruleset and align .github/workflows/release.yml so release commits can succeed with main protected by PR-only rules.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Attempted ruleset bypass updates via GitHub API. Integration actor id 15368 (GitHub Actions app) was rejected by GitHub for this repository ruleset; User actor github-actions[bot] was also rejected as invalid actor type. Proceeding to workflow alignment changes and documenting required bypass alternatives.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Updated .github/workflows/release.yml to explicitly use github.token in checkout for release push credentials. Ruleset bypass remains unconfigured: GitHub API rejected both Integration actor 15368 (GitHub Actions) and User actor github-actions[bot] for this repository ruleset. Next step is selecting a valid bypass actor (typically a repo-installed GitHub App integration) and applying it.
